body: Dear Team, this is a reminder that our company has an outstanding invoice for Q2 services rendered by NovaTech Inc. The total amount due is $10,500. Please settle this payment by the end of the week to avoid any late fees. You can find the invoice details on our shared drive. If you have any questions, feel free to reach out to me directly.

subject: New Cloud Storage Policy
body: As part of our ongoing effort to enhance data security, we are introducing a new cloud storage policy. All employees are required to migrate their files to the new platform by the end of the month. You can access the migration guide on our company's intranet. If you need assistance, please don't hesitate to contact the IT department.

subject: Security Alert: Unusual Sign-in Activity
body: We have detected unusual sign-in activity on your account from an unknown location. As a precautionary measure, we recommend that you change your password immediately. You can find the password reset instructions on our company's website. If you have any concerns, please contact the security team directly.

body: It's time to enroll in our company's benefits program. Please review the available options and select your preferences by the end of the week. You can access the enrollment portal on our company's intranet. If you have any questions, feel free to reach out to the HR department.

body: Our company's software license is due for renewal. To avoid any disruption to our operations, please settle the renewal fee by the end of the day. You can find the payment details on our company's website. If you have any questions, please contact the IT licensing team directly.

body: As part of our company's tax compliance, we require all employees to complete a tax form. Please download the form from our company's intranet and return it to the finance department by the end of the week. If you have any questions, feel free to reach out to us directly.

body: We have uploaded a confidential document to our shared drive, which requires your review and signature. Please access the document and sign the confidentiality agreement by the end of the day. If you have any questions, please contact the legal team directly.

body: We are updating our payment method for invoices. Please update your records to reflect the new payment details. You can find the updated information on our company's website. If you have any questions, feel free to reach out to the accounts receivable team.

body: As part of our ongoing effort to enhance security awareness, we are requiring all employees to complete a mandatory training program. Please access the training portal on our company's intranet and complete the program by the end of the week. If you have any questions, please contact the security team directly.

subject: Cloud Storage Migration: Assistance Available
body: We are migrating our cloud storage to a new platform. If you need assistance with the migration process, please don't hesitate to contact the IT support team. We are available to provide guidance and support throughout the migration period.
